channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti to side of Honest Burgers, 7th March
item.description:
Pls can you repaint, again!! :-(

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Blenheim Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken paving and kerbstone, 7th March
item.description:
Tarmac on pavement outside 17 Beaumont Road has broken up. 84 year old pensioner who lives there feels it is unsafe as she is disabled with walking stick.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaumont Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 7th March
item.description:
Rubbish and broken glass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling issues, 7th March
item.description:
Dog fouling has been repeatedly left on the pavement outside residential homes in this area. The waste has not been cleaned up and is creating hygiene issues for residents and pedestrians. This appears to be a recurring issue and may be caused by a local dog owner walking their dog in the area. I would appreciate if the council could arrange street cleaning and consider monitoring or enforcement patrols. CCTV is present nearby and residents are concerned about the ongoing problem.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aldeburgh Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Resident dumping rubbish, 7th March
item.description:
The residents of 12 Cyril Road Reiss Smith and Leanne Enver, who have sole access to the locked gate at somesham Road, which backs on their back garden, were witnessed clearing out their junk in service road behind the pictured gate and taking it out of the gate. This appears to be what has been fly tipped in somersham Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somersham Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to bin store of leadale wharf, 7th March
item.description:
This car has been abandoned for around 4 years and looks really badly damaged and appears to have alot of rubbish left inside of it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watermint Quay, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags left on street, 7th March
item.description:
The bin bags are street cleaning bin bags(!)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northchurch Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No tax or mot, 7th March
item.description:
Ilegally parked on the highway and has been abandoned with flat tyres and an oil leak.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wordsworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 7th March
item.description:
The cars been here for a couple of weeks & now it’s being smashed up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3A, Fordcroft Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole , temporary fixes churned by many busses, 7th March
item.description:
Large pothole opposite Lidl, temporary fixes are broken up by many busses turn right into Morris Place. Sub base has sunk from previous utility excavation. Note, Stroud Green Road is maintained by Islington Council and not Haringey Council

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Stroud Green Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fresh pile just after the previous lot was removed, 7th March
item.description:
This spot is never clear of rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paston Crescent, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes along Stroud Green Road both sides., 7th March
item.description:
These potholes have existed for over a year. Islington Council are responsible for maintaining Stroud Green Road both sides. Major pothole by bus stop west side is lethal. Islington have previously been informed by this app, by me.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180B, Stroud Green Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsafe wobbly pavement, 7th March
item.description:
This unsafe pavement has been here for 6 months plus. Broken slabs, wobbly and one that is a trip hazard especially for young and elderly which the houses next to it are pensioners

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 359, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Further fly tipping, 7th March
item.description:
Additional rubbish has been added to yesterday's fly tipping report
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edward Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle repeatedly parks for days/weeks in Caygill Close, 7th March
item.description:
This transit van has a sign on the back saying Highway Maintenance but I have good reason to believe this is not true, and someone has put this sign on to avoid parking fees. There is never any sign of it being used for maintenance work. It causes annoyance by parking in resident's bays opposite driveways, making backing out difficult. I have no idea if it has a parking permit. The driver (who I once saw) is not a resident and certainly not a highways maintenance man.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Caygill Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses dumped, 7th March
item.description:
One mattress outside 16 Howard obstructing pavement usage. The other outside 26 Howard Rd obstructing the road. Since Friday 6th March.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Howard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded cycle lane markings, 7th March
item.description:
Markings and signage for cycle path has worn out and is almost unreadable. Makes it hard for everyone trying to commute through park. Only a matter of time before someone gets hurt
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): London Fields East Side, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish dumped yet again, 7th March
item.description:
Fly tipping, yet again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milk Street, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 7th March
item.description:
Whenever our bins are emptied the road needs to be cleaned up! We used to have a regular “sweep “as being so close to the high street we get a large amount of rubbish.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human excrement on Aylwin Estate, 7th March
item.description:
Human excrement in car parking area outside 15-28 Aylwin Estate. Drug users use our estate as a toilet.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
